title: pkg/specgen: fix support for --rootfs on FreeBSD
body:
When using 'podman run --rootfs ...', the image passed to SpecGenToOCI may be nil - in this case, fall back to "freebsd" for the container OS.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
